name: Morched Ammar
summary: Embedded systems engineer and full-stack developer with experience in building complete products end-to-end, from firmware and sensor-driven hardware to web applications with AI-powered features. Recent work includes a full-stack LMS platform and automotive diagnostics validated on real ECUs. Looking to bring hardware-to-cloud range to a startup building digital products for real users. Proficient in a range of technologies, including Python, Java, C/C++, and JavaScript.

experience.title: Final year intern - Mobile Dev
bullets: Built a Flutter/Dart OBD-II client supporting 6 real-time PIDs with live data streaming from real ECUs
Created a Flask-based ECU simulator capable of injecting, reading, and clearing active and pending DTC fault codes
Developed integrated a Wi-Fi/TCP-IP telemetry extraction pipeline tested on a real ECU, enabling real-time diagnostics with ELM327 hardware dongle

experience.title: Summer internship - Embedded System
bullets: Designed a REST API leveraging the 51Degrees device detection engine to identify smartphone models and retrieve environmental metrics
Implemented a Raspberry Pi backend that processed sustainability profiles and transmitted structured data to an ESP8266 over Wi-Fi
Developed delivered near-instant results on QR code scan

education.degree: Bachelor's degree in electronics and automation

education.school: Private higher school of engineering and technology
